response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:31: Identified as non-musical talk segment by VTuber Raden. 2. 03:32-05:00: Identified musical performance segment. 3. Used on-screen text to identify song title '光のすみか', lyricist '安田レイ' (Rei Yasuda), and composer '大窪健悟' (Kengo Okubo). 4. response.global_summary: A promotional video featuring VTuber Raden introducing merchandise and announcing a future video, followed by a musical performance of 'Hikari no Sumika'.

scenes.description: The VTuber (Raden) introduces merchandise and discusses a future promotional video in an informal talk segment. No vocal music plays.
The song '光のすみか' (Hikari no Sumika) is performed by Raden and other VTubers on a stage with a digital background. On-screen text attributes lyrics to Rei Yasuda and composition to Kengo Okubo.
